address_type.description: Specifies whether the IP address is internal or external.

description.description: An optional description of the IP address resource.

ip_version.description: The IP version to be used, either IPv4 or IPv6.

ipv6_endpoint_type.description: Specifies the type of IPv6 access configuration, e.g., 'EXTERNAL'.

labels.description: A set of key-value pairs to organize and categorize the resource.

name.description: A unique name for the IP address resource.

network.description: The network to which the IP address belongs, applicable for internal IPs.
